title: Efficient Transformer Architectures
description: Developing transformer architectures with sub-quadratic complexity for processing long sequences, enabling efficient reasoning over large documents and codebases.

title: Adaptive Self-Supervised Learning
description: Designing adaptive masking strategies for self-supervised pre-training that dynamically adjust to input complexity, improving downstream task performance.

title: Neural Network Compression Toolkit
description: Building an open-source toolkit for structured pruning and quantization of deep learning models, targeting efficient deployment on edge devices.

title: Theoretical Foundations of Scaling Laws
description: Investigating the mathematical foundations underlying neural scaling laws, providing theoretical guarantees and practical guidance for efficient model scaling.
